render-mode.text:
Your Spreadsheet Freedom Playbook

Hello ${firstName!""},

Thank you for downloading The Complete Spreadsheet Freedom Playbook — it is attached to this email as a PDF.

Inside you'll find:

  • The self-assessment: are you ready to ditch spreadsheets?
  • The 30-day migration plan that keeps your business running
  • Questions to ask any ERP vendor before you sign
  • How to calculate your ROI before you commit to anything

Start with the self-assessment in Part 2 — it takes five minutes and tells you exactly how urgent your situation is.

Explore GrowERP

Questions about your migration? Just reply to this email — a real person reads it.

Best regards,
The GrowERP Team

You received this email because you requested the free guide on our website.

© ${ec.l10n.format(ec.user.nowTimestamp, 'yyyy')} GrowERP. All rights reserved.
